title: Panchakuta Basadi, Kambadahalli
tagline: Panchakuta Basadi, Kambadahalli — spiritual town of Karnataka

overview.short: Panchakuta Basadi (or Panchakoota Basadi) is a Jain temple complex located in the Kambadahalli village of the Mandya district in the Karnataka state of Southern India.
overview.description: Panchakuta Basadi (or Panchakoota Basadi) is a Jain temple complex located in the Kambadahalli village of the Mandya district in the Karnataka state of Southern India. Panchakuta Basadi is often described as one of the finest examples of the Western Ganga variety of Dravidian architecture, related to the Jain faith and iconography.

topPlaces.name: Addihalli, Mandya
topPlaces.description: Addihalli, Nagamangala is a village in the southern state of Karnataka, India. It is located in the Nagamangala taluk of Mandya district in Karnataka.

topPlaces.name: Bindiganavile
topPlaces.description: Bindiganavale is a village and hobli headquarters in Nagamangala taluka of Mandya district, Karnataka, India. It is about 50 kilometres (31 mi) from Mandya and 130 km (81 mi) from Bangalore.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Panchakuta Basadi, Kambadahalli?
faq.a: The best time to visit Panchakuta Basadi, Kambadahalli is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Panchakuta Basadi, Kambadahalli?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Mysuru Airport (71 km) and the nearest railway station is Mysuru Junction (62 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Panchakuta Basadi, Kambadahalli?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Panchakuta Basadi, Kambadahalli at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Panchakuta Basadi, Kambadahalli?
faq.a: Stays in Panchakuta Basadi, Kambadahalli start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Panchakuta Basadi, Kambadahalli?
faq.a: The top attractions are Addihalli, Mandya, Bindiganavile.
